faq.a1.message: AiShort (originally named ChatGPT Shortcut) is an open-source AI prompt management tool that provides a curated list of prompts to help you quickly find instructions for various scenarios. The project initially focused on ChatGPT, so the GitHub repo name remains ChatGPT-Shortcut; today it supports all major large language models (including Claude, Gemini, DeepSeek, Kimi, etc.). The name is kept for historical continuity.

faq.a2.message: Three steps: (1) Search or browse prompts by tag on the homepage; (2) Click the "Copy" button on any prompt card; (3) Paste it into any AI chat tool and add your specific question following the prompt's instructions.

faq.a3.message: Prompts are model-agnostic and work with all mainstream large language models. International models: ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Grok. Chinese models: DeepSeek, Qwen, ERNIE Bot, Doubao, Kimi, ChatGLM, Spark, Hunyuan. API platforms: OpenRouter, SiliconFlow, Groq.

faq.a4.message: Awesome ChatGPT Prompts is one of AiShort's content sources. AiShort builds on top of it with: a graphical browsing interface with tag filtering, translations in 18 languages, personal prompt management (favorites/sorting/tagging), community sharing and voting, Chrome/Edge/Firefox browser extensions (Alt+Shift+S to open the sidebar), JSON data export and backup, and an offline edition for corporate intranets.

faq.a5.message: Completely free and open source (code hosted on GitHub). Browsing, searching, and copying prompts requires no registration. Registering unlocks: favorites with drag-and-drop sorting, custom tags, creating and managing personal prompts, community sharing and voting, JSON export and backup, and cross-device sync.

faq.a6.message: AiShort provides a standalone offline edition designed for corporate intranets, government networks, and other environments without internet access. It requires no backend server or user account, works out of the box after deployment, and retains core features like browsing, searching, favorites, and custom prompts. The data format is compatible with the online version.

faq.q1.message: What is AiShort? Why is it called "ChatGPT Shortcut"?

faq.q3.message: Is AiShort only for ChatGPT? Does it support other AI models?

faq.q4.message: How is AiShort different from Awesome ChatGPT Prompts and other open-source prompt collections?

faq.q5.message: Is AiShort free? Do I need to register?

faq.q6.message: Can AiShort be used in corporate intranets or offline environments?

faq.scenario.a.message: It works well for tasks related to the title and description on this page. If the first attempt is not ideal, provide more context inside the placeholder, or append constraints like “answer step by step” or “give examples”.

faq.scenario.q.message: What scenarios is this prompt best suited for?

faq.tips.a.message: First, make the [placeholder] more specific (add style, length, domain details). Second, follow up unsatisfying replies with “make it more X”. Third, compare outputs across Claude / GPT-4 / Gemini and similar models.

faq.tips.q.message: How can I improve the output quality?

faq.usage.a.message: Copy the prompt, replace the [placeholder] in square brackets with your own input, then paste it into ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, DeepSeek, Qwen, or any conversational AI interface that supports natural language and send it.

faq.usage.q.message: How do I use this prompt?

feedback.description.message: Your feedback is important to us!

feedback.paragraph.message: ChatGPT Shortcut is an open-source prompt management tool dedicated to improving AI efficiency. We eagerly look forward to your participation: whether reporting bugs, suggesting features, or sharing premium prompts. For prompt submissions, we support multiple languages, and once accepted, they will be included with attribution (searchable by username). Every contribution helps community members expand their thinking and boost productivity. Let's build a perfect prompt library together!

feedback.subtitle.message: Every contribution you make helps make this open-source project better

homepage.description.message: Frustrated by irrelevant AI answers? AiShort offers practical prompt templates for writing, coding, and translation. One-click copy to unlock precise AI outputs and double your efficiency!

homepage.slogan.message: Curated AI Prompts for More Efficient Conversations

homepage.title.message: AiShort - AI Prompt Library | Curated Prompts to Boost AI Productivity

howto.step1.text.message: Copy the prompt template to your clipboard.

howto.step2.text.message: Replace the [placeholder] sections with your specific content.

howto.step3.text.message: Paste into ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, DeepSeek, or another conversational AI interface and run it.

info.communityPrompts.message: Prompts on this page are shared and uploaded by users. We do not guarantee the accuracy, quality, or completeness of the content, nor do we assume any legal liability for issues arising from the content. If you find any infringement or other issues, please contact us.
